evidence_snippets: Yes yes yes, this one, im 21, I should be strong and powerful, but this disability always makes me feel out of place when with people, I feel the need to connect but sometimes I cant be on the same frequency as other people, and I come accross as rude or a cunt or whatever

It’s a lifetime thing that I’m very afraid of and it does affect every day life, I have to take tablets that probably have affects on my mental health. And plus I have to take care of of myself way more than I should at 21, I would love to just work work work, but it’s not an option anymore for me

active_course.description: The name or description of a course Alex is currently enrolled in or studying.

course_status.description: Where Alex currently is in an active course — week number, module, percentage complete.

system_goal.description: The overarching goal or directive of the Lucchese system for Alex.

memory_status.description: Current state of Alex's memory system — what is populated, pending, or degraded.

historical_context.description: Stable background context about Alex that rarely changes.

personality_mode.description: The personality or interaction mode currently configured for Alex.
